message:
feat(frankenterm-core): expand parser coverage and differential test fixtures

- parser.rs: extend VT parser with additional escape sequence handling
- differential_terminal.rs: expand differential test cases for broader
  parser conformance coverage
- known_mismatches.tsv: update known mismatch registry with new entries
  and root-cause annotations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,2 @@
 # id|cols|rows|input_hex|root_cause
-csi_cup_reposition|10|3|48656c6c6f1b5b323b334858|Parser currently emits CSI as raw Escape action and the differential harness intentionally does not apply cursor-positioning semantics yet.
-csi_erase_line_right|10|3|41424344451b5b32441b5b304b|Parser currently emits CSI erase controls as raw Escape action and the differential harness intentionally does not mutate the grid for EL semantics yet.
-csi_erase_display|10|3|41421b5b324a5a|Parser currently emits CSI erase-display controls as raw Escape action and the differential harness intentionally does not apply ED semantics yet.
+csi_cub_left|10|3|6162631b5b32445a|Parser still emits unsupported CSI cursor-relative movement (CUB) as raw Escape action; differential harness intentionally ignores it for now.
